author: Michael Campbell
review_text: Biggest joke of an auction, went at 745am on auction day. They don’t have keys on cars to look at them, 70% of the cars I was looking at were locked. Don’t waste your time here Along with OUTRAGEOUS buy fees. Works out to be 3-4x in buy fees than any other auction

author: BBB complainant
review_text: Sales and Advertising Issues. On 10/9/25 bought a car from America's Auto Auction St. Louis . I have been trying to retrieve the title. When I checked online, it told me that my title is at the auction, but when I went to pick it up, it was not there. When I spoke to Angel REMOVED manager) she tells me that they cannot get the title because it has a lein on it and that I need to speak with the General manager ( REMOVED ). When I stated to her that the car should not have been sold without a clean title and that I have spent $2300 in parts and labor for the car, she then tells me that I should have never started working on it until I had the title in my hand, as if I was to blame. Now I am getting the run around from Angel REMOVED manager) who now keeps avoiding my calls. At this point, I don't beleive that she has been relaying my messages to the General manager because no one has reached out to me to have this issue resolved. Customer Answer Date: 02/13/2026 This complaint was resolved by the business.

author: BBB complainant
review_text: Billing Issues. On 6/26/25 I was issued a check Americas Auto Auction for a vehicle I sold. On 6/27/25, I picked the check up from the auction. I deposited the check on 6/30/25. On 7/3/25 I was alerted by my bank that the check had been returned. I contacted Americas Auto Auction and spoke to someone in accounting who told me that the vehicle was bought back and REMOVED said to stop payment on the check. I attempted to reach REMOVED and have been unsuccessful. I dont know why the vehicle was bought back considering all sales are final. I would not have been able to pick up the check had I not satisfied the requirements on my end. It seems this business is operating using discriminatory business practices and rules that apply to some, dont apply to all. I did not even receive a courtesy call letting me know that he was stopping payment on the check, so I have incurred additional fees by my bank. I operate a small business, so every dime matters to me.
